Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class OptionalVerifierImpl

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<OptionalVerifier,OptionalValidator,Optional<?>>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.OptionalVerifierImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleObjectVerifier<OptionalVerifier,Optional<?>>, OptionalVerifier
public final class OptionalVerifierImpl extends AbstractObjectVerifier<OptionalVerifier,OptionalValidator,Optional<?>> implements OptionalVerifier
Default implementation of OptionalVerifier.

      Ensures that the optional contains a value.

    • contains

      public OptionalVerifier contains(Object expected, String name)
      Description copied from interface: OptionalVerifier
      Ensures that the optional contains the expected value.
      Specified by:
      contains in interface OptionalVerifier
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected value (null matches an empty optional)
      name - the name of the expected value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
